main_event: 12-year-old in Hamtramck observed two bullet-shaped white objects with vapor trails traveling west to east for 4 seconds on 20 March 1967.
sighted_object: bullet shaped, white about like a star, except for the vapor trail; two objects each about 7 wooden match sticks wide
witness_description: civilian male age 12, outdoors in residential section, father also present but did not see object
interesting_points: Two bullet-shaped objects with vapor trails traveling from West to East
Objects white, about like a star in color, fuzzy or blurred edges
Going at a terrific speed; visible only about 4 seconds
Objects separated by about 3 inches (angular) when seen
Compared to a marble streaking across the sky with vapor trail that disappears almost immediately
Observer is 12 years old and wrote initial inquiry letter requesting Blue Book forms
